title: Allahabad High Court UP HJS 2023 Mains Exam Date 2026 for 83 Post
short_information: High Court of Judicature at Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh has released the notification of District Judge Recruitment 2023. Many people also know this recruitment by the name of UP HJS. This year there are a total of 83 posts in Uttar Pradesh Allahabad High Court HJS Recruitment for which online applications will run from 15 March 2024 to 15 May 2024. See the advertisement for information related to age limit, syllabus, selection procedure, pay scale in UP HJS Exam 2024. High Court of Judicature at Allahabad Uttar Pradesh Higher Judicial Service UPHJS Recruitment 2023 UPHJS Exam 2023 : Short Details of Notification
application_fee: General / OBC / EWS : 1400/- SC / ST : 1200/- PH Divyang Gen / OBC / EWS : 750/- PH Divyang SC / ST : 500/- Pay the Exam Fee Through Offline E Challan Fee Mode Only. Candidate Can Print Challan and Submit Fee Before Apply Online. Allahabad High Court HJS Exam 2024 :
eligibility: Higher Judicial Services (HJS) 35 22 08 17 01 83 Bachelor Degree in Law Minimum 07 Year Advocate Practice More Details Read Notification

tables.table_name: Allahabad High Court HJS Exam 2024 : Age Limit as on 01/01/2024 Minimum Age : 35 Years. Maximum Age : 45 Years. Age Relaxation Extra as per High Court of Judicature at Allahabad Higher Judicial Services Exam 2023-2024 Rules.
rows: Bachelor Degree in Law Minimum 07 Year Advocate Practice More Details Read Notification

text_sections.section: How to Fill Allahabad High Court HJS Recruitment Online Form 2024
text_sections.content: Uttar Pradesh Higher Judicial Service UPHJS Recruitment Conducted by Allahabad High Court AHC, Prayagraj Recruitment UP HJS Vacancies. Candidate Can Apply Between 15/03/2024 to 30/04/2024 | Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Recruitment Application Form in Allahabad HC HJS Recruitment 2023. | Kindly Check and College the All Document - Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. | Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form - Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. | Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Columns Carefully. | No Application Fees in Coast Guard Recruitment But. Candidate Must Final Submit the Form. | Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
